name: GH_Arrange
summary: Enumerates possible types of object arrangement.

enum_values.name: MoveToFront
enum_values.summary: Put the objects on the top of the stack.

enum_values.name: MoveForwards
enum_values.summary: Objects are inserted above the first occluding object.

enum_values.name: MoveToBack
enum_values.summary: Put the objects on the bottom of the stack.

enum_values.name: MoveBackwards
enum_values.summary: Objects are inserted below the first occluded object.
